headline: Affirm CFO Touts 39% GMV Growth, Profit Gains and Amazon Renewal at Investor Conference
summary: Affirm (NASDAQ:AFRM) reported strong momentum over the past year, highlighting both growth and profitability gains, according to comments from CFO Rob O’Hare during a recent investor discussion. headline: Lowe’s is now part of the Bazaarvoice Visual Syndication Network
summary: Bazaarvoice clients can now syndicate photos and videos from Instagram users, Bazaarvoice Influenster Sampling Campaigns, and their brand-owned content to Lowe’sAUSTIN, Texas, March 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Bazaarvoice, Inc., the world’s most trusted network of authentic consumer voices, today announced that Lowe’s is now part of the Bazaarvoice Visual Syndication Network (VSN). headline: How Q4 Results And 2026 Guidance Are Rewriting The Lowe's (LOW) Investment Story
summary: The analyst fair value estimate for Lowe's Companies has shifted slightly, from US$286.13 to US$286.48 per share, keeping the story focused on fine tuning rather than wholesale change. That modest move lines up with a split in recent research, where some analysts point to Q4 strength and potential upside, while others lean on more cautious FY26 margin and earnings assumptions. As you read on, you will see how these differing views shape the evolving Lowe's narrative and what to watch next in...
